utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: You know , you are friend getting married , it is gotta change things .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: You really think it would be that different ?

emotion_cause.span: 2_You really think it would be that different ?
2_You really think it would be that different ?

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: I mean pretty soon they are gonna be having kids , and then they are just gonna be hanging out with other couples who have kids .

emotion_cause.span: 4_pretty soon they are gonna be having kids , and then they are just gonna be hanging out with other couples who have kids .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: And then maybe they are gonna have to leave the city to be near a Volvo dealership .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: I do not want them to move to a Volvo dealership .
